description: Add wake word detection types, privacy types, wake word detector, porcupine provider, audio buffer log, privacy lamp controller, and privacy audit system to @quant/quant-live with full test coverage
steps: 1. Add new types to packages/quant-live/src/types.ts: WakeWordConfig (wakePhrase, sensitivity, engineType, fallbackToPushToTalk), WakeWordEvent (type: 'detected'|'timeout'|'error', timestamp, confidence, phrase), AudioBufferEntry (id, data: Float32Array, timestamp, duration, starred), PrivacyLampState ('dormant'|'wake-listening'|'active-listening'|'recording'), PrivacyInputSource (type: 'mic'|'camera'|'screen'|'wake-word', active, startedAt), PrivacyAuditEvent (id, type: 'mic_activated'|'mic_deactivated'|'audio_sent_to_server'|'frame_captured'|'frame_sent_to_server'|'buffer_cleared'|'forget_requested', timestamp, metadata)

2. Create packages/quant-live/src/wake-word/wake-word-detector.ts: WakeWordDetector class with start/stop lifecycle, configurable wake phrases (default 'Hey Quant'), confidence threshold filtering, event emission on detection (onDetected callback), fallback to push-to-talk when no engine available, uses the provider pattern like ASRProvider

3. Create packages/quant-live/src/wake-word/porcupine-provider.ts: PorcupineProvider class implementing a WakeWordEngine interface, accepts accessKey from config, processes raw audio frames (feedAudio method), emits detection events with confidence scores, includes an EnergyBasedFallback class that does simple energy-threshold keyword detection as a stub when Porcupine is not licensed

4. Create packages/quant-live/src/privacy/audio-buffer-log.ts: AudioBufferLog class with circular ring buffer implementation storing last N seconds (default 300s = 5 min) of AudioBufferEntry items, methods: append(chunk), getLastN(seconds), star(startTime, endTime), forget(seconds) to delete last N seconds, clear(), auto-purge logic that removes unstarred entries older than bufferDuration

5. Create packages/quant-live/src/privacy/privacy-lamp.ts: PrivacyLampController class that tracks all active input sources (registerSource/unregisterSource), computes aggregate PrivacyLampState from active sources, emits state changes via onStateChange callback, CANNOT be disabled or hidden programmatically (no disable/hide methods, readonly state), logs what was captured vs what was sent (localOnly vs transmitted tracking)

6. Create packages/quant-live/src/privacy/privacy-audit.ts: PrivacyAudit class with immutable append-only log of PrivacyAuditEvent entries, methods: record(event), query(filter: {type?, since?, until?}), exportJSON(), getLastHour(), clear() (user-initiated only), persist/restore from storage interface
7. Update packages/quant-live/src/index.ts to export all new modules: WakeWordDetector, PorcupineProvider, EnergyBasedFallback, AudioBufferLog, PrivacyLampController, PrivacyAudit, and all new types

8. Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/wake-word-detector.test.ts: test detection callback fires with correct event, confidence filtering rejects low-confidence, fallback mode when no engine, start/stop lifecycle

9. Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/audio-buffer-log.test.ts: test ring buffer wraps correctly, auto-purge removes old unstarred entries, star preserves entries past purge window, forget deletes last N seconds, getLastN returns correct range

10. Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/privacy-lamp.test.ts: test state transitions (dormant -> wake-listening -> active-listening -> recording), cannot be force-disabled (no such method exists), registers/unregisters sources correctly, emits state changes

11. Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/privacy-audit.test.ts: test append-only (cannot mutate past entries), query filters by type and time range, exportJSON produces valid array, clear removes all entries
acceptance_criteria: Running `pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live run typecheck` passes with no errors
Running `pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live run test` passes all tests including the 4 new test files
PrivacyLampController has no disable() or hide() method - verified by absence in source
AudioBufferLog auto-purges unstarred entries older than configured duration
WakeWordDetector falls back gracefully when no engine is provided
Total new code is under 500 LOC
findings: Node.js 22 and pnpm 9 needed to be installed via mise. Pre-commit hook runs prettier via lint-staged. All 160 tests pass, typecheck clean.
